overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a hooded character in white robes descending ornate stone stairs along a mountain lake waterfront at dusk. The character explores a historic stone terrace, passes through a rocky covered passage, and approaches a wooden boathouse structure illuminated by burning braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper stone terrace overlooking mountain lake

agents.ego_description: hooded character in white robes walking down ornate stone stairs toward a circular platform with a large burning brazier

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with weathered steps descending toward the water
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars lining both sides of the stairs
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars lining both sides of the stairs
large stone bowl with bright flames atop a circular overlook platform
calm dark blue water of a mountain lake under twilight sky
snow-capped mountains and fortified structures visible across the lake

segments.scene_description: The character begins descending a grand stone staircase on an open terrace overlooking a vast mountain lake at dusk. Ornate carved balustrades line the path, and a large burning brazier illuminates the circular platform ahead. The distant shoreline features snow-covered peaks and fortified buildings under a deep blue twilight sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky covered passage leading to waterfront boathouse

events.description: character enters a darker rocky passage carved into the cliffside with overhead cover
exits the rocky passage to reveal the wooden boathouse gazebo structure by the water

agents.ego_description: character descends through the shadowy rocky corridor and emerges to approach the waterfront boathouse

entered.detail: dark brown rocky wall carved into the mountainside forming a covered passage
stone ceiling extending overhead creating a sheltered corridor
octagonal wooden pavilion with a pointed roof situated on the waterfront
burning torch in a stone bowl illuminating the dark passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered rocky passage carved into the cliff, with stone overhead providing shelter. The lighting dims to torchlight as they proceed through the corridor. Upon exiting, the wooden gazebo boathouse comes into view on the waterfront, with the lake visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with gazebo and flowering trees

events.description: character circles around the boathouse gazebo and continues descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: character walks around the boathouse gazebo structure and proceeds down the stairs toward the lower waterfront path

entered.detail: tree with pink blossoms growing along the stone pathway
solitary tree growing on a small island or promontory in the lake
burning torch mounted on a stone pillar along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character circles the wooden boathouse gazebo, passing close to a large burning brazier. The scene opens to a lower promenade with flowering cherry trees and views of a small island with a solitary tree in the lake. The stone stairs continue downward toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside walkway with distant views of shoreline structures

events.description: wooden boathouse building comes into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: character walks along the cobblestone path beside the lake, approaching a distant wooden building

entered.detail: weathered cobblestone walkway running along the water's edge
large wooden structure with a sloped roof situated at the water's edge
fortified buildings and towers visible on the far shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the cobblestone pathway running alongside the lake. The ornate stone balustrade continues on the right, while the left side opens to views of the water and distant fortified structures on the far shore. A large wooden boathouse building becomes visible ahead in the distance.

events.description: character slows and approaches the entrance of the wooden boathouse building

agents.ego_description: character descends the final stairs and approaches the wooden boathouse building at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character descends the final stretch of stairs, approaching the large wooden boathouse building that now dominates the left side of the frame. The structure features detailed wooden architecture and a sloped roof, situated directly at the water's edge. Burning braziers continue to line the path, illuminating the final approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, elevated terrace overlooking a mountain lake into a sheltered rocky corridor that leads to a waterfront boathouse. It begins with the character descending a grand stone staircase lined with ornate balustrades, passing a burning brazier under a deep blue twilight sky with snow-covered peaks in the distance. As the character moves forward, the open air gives way to a semi-covered rocky passage carved into the cliff, where the lighting dims and shifts to the warm glow of torchlight. The scene then opens up as the character exits the corridor, revealing a wooden gazebo boathouse situated directly on the waterfront with the vast lake stretching out beyond.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high terrace overlooking a lake down to the immediate waterfront of a large wooden boathouse. It begins as the character circles a gazebo and passes a burning brazier, where the view opens up to a lower promenade lined with flowering cherry trees and a solitary tree on a distant island. As the character proceeds along the cobblestone pathway, the scene shifts to reveal an ornate stone balustrade on the right and fortified structures across the water on the left. The camera then follows the descent of the final stretch of stairs, with the environment narrowing toward the water's edge. Finally, the large wooden boathouse with its detailed sloped roof dominates the frame, illuminated by a line of burning braziers that light the final approach.
